span.p:
Gateway Container
agentshroud-gateway
:8080 → REST API
:8181 → HTTP CONNECT proxy
Python 3.11 / FastAPI
512 MB / 1 CPU

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bot Container
agentshroud-bot
:18789 → OpenClaw gateway
:18790 (host) → Web UI
Node.js 22 / OpenClaw
4 GB / 2 CPU
